title: GMod Title Screen
description: A mod that replaces Minecraft's title screen with one that highly resembles GMod's title screen style.
body:
GMod Title Screen

Transforms the usual Minecraft title screen into one that looks highly reminiscent of [Garry's Mod](https://store.steampowered.com/app/4000/Garrys_Mod/)'s title screen. Lightly configurable. Originally taken from a [personal modpack mod](https://github.com/oatmealine/n3ko-smp-modpack/tree/main/mod). ![](https://git.oat.zone/oat/gmod-title-screen/media/branch/1.18/docs/screenshot1.png)
--- Currently, there is no way to change the backgrounds (at least, without having to abide by the resolution and amount restrictions), however I plan on implementing it at one point (read: whenever I figure out how to). Does not come included with a Gravity Gun. Refunds not accepted.
